title: Senior Software Engineer - Salesforce India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Salesforce India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Salesforce India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Vijayawada operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Salesforce India:
Salesforce India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Salesforce India!
